title: Security for costs not required of defendant
doc_html:
§5037.  Security for costs not required of defendant

The defendant shall not be required to give security for costs, or to advance costs in any case in which suit is brought by the state.
doc_text:
§5037.  Security for costs not required of defendant
The defendant shall not be required to give security for costs, or to advance costs in any case in which suit is brought by the state.
